goal: universities and colleges in British Columbia, Canada; fields: name, website, type
notes: ONTA-384 regression guard for the BC-universities enumeration + scoped-schema failure mode. Gold roster is the closed set of ~40 public/designated post-secondary institutions; requested attributes are the exhaustive ceiling {name, website, type}; allowed types are the clean Institution subtypes {University, College, Institution}. The pure profile grader (grade_enumeration_profile) scores a GraphProfileSnapshot offline — no live web. Today's broken profile (~5/40 entities, ~49 attrs, ~17 types incl. Colour/Asset/Online/InstructionMode) must FAIL coverage/scope/fragmentation; post-P1/P2/P5 clean profiles must PASS under POST_FIX_PROFILE_THRESHOLDS.

questions.question: How many universities and colleges are in the British Columbia roster?
questions.reasoning: Closed roster has 40 institutions. Single-entity aggregation -> T1.

questions.question: List the public research universities in British Columbia.
questions.expected_answer: University of British Columbia, Simon Fraser University, University of Victoria, University of Northern British Columbia
questions.reasoning: Closed subset of the four major public research universities. Single-entity list -> T1.

questions.question: Which institutions are colleges (not universities)?
questions.expected_answer: BCIT, Langara, Douglas, Camosun, Okanagan, Selkirk, CNC, COTR, North Island, Northern Lights, Coast Mountain, VCC, JIBC, NVIT, Native Education, Corpus Christi, Columbia, Alexander, Coquitlam, Acsenda, LaSalle Vancouver, Sprott Shaw

questions.reasoning: Lookup of one attribute on a named entity -> T2.
